next_steps: Biopsy of a representative liver lesion
Biopsy of the sternal or humeral bone lesion
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and bone marrow aspiration/biopsy
Ophthalmologic examination to rule out neuroretinitis
Echocardiogram to rule out culture-negative endocarditis

differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) with disseminated bacterial/fungal abscesses
next_steps: Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to screen for Chronic Granulomatous Disease
Biopsy of a bone lesion with culture (bacterial, fungal, mycobacterial) and histopathology
Biopsy of a hepatic lesion for histopathology and microbial culture
Comprehensive immunodeficiency workup (immunoglobulin levels, lymphocyte subsets)
Echocardiogram to rule out culture-negative endocarditis
